name: Turkey Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and mash the potatoes, or use leftovers. Stir in the egg.
2. Spread the mixture into a well-oiled 9-inch pie pan.
3. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 minutes.
4. Combine the mayonnaise and lemon juice; stir in the turkey, celery, and peas.
5. Spoon the mixture into the potato crust.
6. Top with cheese.
7. Continue baking for 15-20 minutes or until hot through. Serves 6.
